name: kubernetes_state_core
explanation: The Kubernetes State Core check is a Cluster-Agent built-in (Go-implemented, the `datadog_checks/kubernetes_state_core` directory ships only `conf.yaml.example` — no Python check). Per the README, it embeds the kube-state-metrics logic inside the Datadog Cluster Agent, so there is no external Prometheus endpoint to discover and no required URL/credentials in the spec. Discovery is purely 'is the Cluster Agent running?' which the Cluster Agent answers for itself via its own ServiceAccount and Kubernetes API access. Treat as `generic` with method `other` because no network probe is required.
notes: No Python check; integration ships only assets and example config. The Cluster Agent enables this check directly when KSM Core is turned on, using the Agent's own in-cluster ServiceAccount.
